label: Ordering the same basket on autopilot
definition: User describes reordering the same items without browsing.

label: Discovery happens only through search
definition: User finds products by typing a known name, not by browsing.

label: Won't risk an unfamiliar category
definition: User hesitates to buy an unfamiliar category without knowing quality.

label: First purchase feels too expensive to risk
definition: User wants a smaller/cheaper way to try something new.

label: Unaware the category exists on the app
definition: User did not know the platform sold that category.

label: Delivery and order accuracy
definition: Missing items, wrong items, late delivery.

label: Pricing, surge and handling fees
definition: Complaints about fees, surge pricing, or value.
